title: Lamb Kidney Hash
description: A traditional dish made with lamb kidneys and a crunchy hash topping. Serve with your favorite sides for a hearty meal.

ingredients.name: Lamb Kidneys
ingredients.notes: Fresh lamb kidneys, cleaned and trimmed

instructions: 1. Season the lamb kidneys with salt and pepper.
2. Dredge the kidneys in flour, then dip in beaten egg, and coat in crumbly hash.
3. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the Canadian bacon and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Add the breaded lamb kidneys and cook until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
6. Serve the lamb kidney hash hot, garnished with chopped parsley or chives if desired.
